# REQ-CR-260009: MVP Placeholder and Fallback Trust Constraints

- Class: CR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-17
- Source decision: I6 (MVP fallback behavior)

## Requirement

MVP placeholder and fallback behavior shall be explicit and non-deceptive, preserve shell consistency, avoid non-functional fake controls, and always provide clear return access to the workspace.

## Rationale

Trust-preserving fallback behavior prevents user confusion and protects perceived product integrity during scoped MVP delivery.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for MVP constraint: placeholder messaging standards and navigation fallback requirements.
- Out of scope for this requirement: full implementation of deferred supporting pages.

## Verification

- UX checks confirm placeholder pages are clearly marked and non-deceptive.
- Navigation checks confirm every placeholder route provides return path to workspace.
- Release checks confirm fallback policy compliance in supporting-page surfaces.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260020
- Related backlog items: BI-260017
